Home › Volusia County › New Smyrna Beach › BACI PIZZERIA & RISTORANTE
F 37

BACI PIZZERIA & RISTORANTE

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: April 17, 2026

Loved (4.5★) but failing (F, 37/100) · bottom of Volusia County

BACI PIZZERIA & RISTORANTE is a 4.5-star room with an F-grade kitchen — the kind of gap a star rating will never warn you about, which is the whole reason this page exists.

By health score it sits near the bottom of Volusia County on health score — among the riskier kitchens in the county. The grade reflects 6 high-priority, 4 intermediate, and 3 basic violations at its last inspection on April 17, 2026. Worse, the trend is downward. Safer, higher-graded picks nearby are listed below.

Get directions Call (386) 410-5801

Safer options nearby

Higher-graded restaurants close to BACI PIZZERIA & RISTORANTE, by Florida DBPR grade:

  • A
    STAVRO'S PIZZA PLACE

    4.5★ 0.1 mi away

  • A
    TACO SHACK INC

    4.7★ 0.3 mi away

  • A
    ANCHOR INN

    4.9★ 0.9 mi away

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. April 17, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    6 high-priority · 4 intermediate · 3 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 02 — Consumer advisory, date-marking & labeling of ready-to-eat foods
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating) (×2)
    • 06 — Potentially hazardous foods properly thawed
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×2)
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used
    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training

  2. October 23, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Call Back - Complied

    0 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 0 basic

    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training

  3. October 15, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Warning Issued

    3 high-priority · 4 intermediate · 4 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 02 — Consumer advisory, date-marking & labeling of ready-to-eat foods
    • 06 — Potentially hazardous foods properly thawed
    • 11 — Employee health knowledge; no ill/symptomatic employee present
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained (×2)
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×2)
    • 40 — Employee personal belongings
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used
    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training
